notes: The agent generally handled the conversation well, but had some issues with handling the patient's date of birth and verifying insurance details.

bugs.title: Incorrect DOB handling
bugs.evidence_quote: Your date of birth is July fourth two thousand for demo purposes.
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should have asked for the patient's date of birth instead of providing a default value and then updated it correctly when the patient provided the correct DOB.
bugs.reproducibility: scenario id: schedule_simple, steps to reproduce: provide an incorrect DOB and then correct it

bugs.title: Missing insurance verification
bugs.evidence_quote: If you have a PPO insurance plan, just bring your insurance card with you.
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should have verified the patient's insurance details earlier in the conversation, not just at the end.
bugs.reproducibility: scenario id: schedule_simple, steps to reproduce: provide insurance details at the end of the conversation
